_comment: Curated US macro-catalyst calendar for the Portfolio Watcher. Events that drive overnight GAP risk for a Nasdaq-leveraged book (QLD/QQQ/TQQQ) — the watcher is close-based, so this never changes a SIGNAL, only execution timing / gap awareness. Dates are the US RELEASE date (Eastern); times are 08:30 ET for CPI/NFP and ~14:00 ET for FOMC. SOURCES — FOMC: federalreserve.gov/monetarypolicy/fomccalendars.htm (all 8 2026 decision days, authoritative). CPI: bls.gov/schedule (full-year 2026, verified). NFP/Employment Situation: bls.gov/schedule — Jun release (Jul 2) verified; Aug-Dec follow the BLS first-Friday convention (verify a borderline date against bls.gov/schedule, e.g. holiday shifts). REFRESH ANNUALLY: when verified_through passes, catalysts.py flags the calendar stale — re-pull next year's FOMC + BLS dates.
